column1: # These are CI-specific suppressions for the HTTP demo-mode smoke container.
# In production, Traefik terminates TLS and adds HSTS; cookies carry the Secure
# flag via SESSION_COOKIE_SECURE. None of these apply over plain HTTP in CI.

column3: Cookie without Secure flag — expected over HTTP in CI; Traefik adds TLS in production
X-XSS-Protection header — obsolete header intentionally not set (superseded by CSP)
Strict-Transport-Security — no TLS in CI demo; Traefik sets HSTS in production
Timestamp Disclosure — HTML timestamps are informational, not sensitive
